description: A Phoenix LiveView Input Group component.
docs:
Add to the `html_helpers` function in your `my_app_web.ex`:

    import MyAppWeb.Components.UI.InputGroup

Replace `MyAppWeb` with your application's module prefix.

files.content:
defmodule MyAppWeb.Components.UI.InputGroup do use Phoenix.Component attr :class, :string, default: nil attr :rest, :global slot :addon_start slot :addon_end slot :inner_block, required: true def input_group(assigns) do ~H"""
{render_slot(@addon_start)}
*]:rounded-l-none", @addon_end != [] && "[&>*]:rounded-r-none" ]}> {render_slot(@inner_block)}
{render_slot(@addon_end)}
""" end end

name: input-group
title: Input Group
